name: weegloo-service-user
description: Weegloo ServiceLogin SDK for browser apps — Google OAuth 2.0 sign-in for app-managed members of a Weegloo Space. Pure vanilla JavaScript, zero dependencies.
author: Weegloo

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const fs=require('fs');for(const f of ['src/weegloo-service-login.js','dist/weegloo-service-login.js','dist/weegloo-service-login.esm.js','dist/weegloo-service-login.min.js']){const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(t.indexOf(\"'\"+v+\"'\")<0&&t.indexOf('\"'+v+'\"')<0){throw new Error('VERSION mismatch in '+f+': package.json='+v);}console.log('OK '+f);}"
